typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  DISTINCT    B.row_id   ,A.master_row_id   ,B.birth_date   ,B.gender FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_master_stg1] A   INNER JOIN[ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] B 	ON A.birth_date=B.birth_date 	   AND A.gender=B.gender       /*AM 20211212: added this condition to avoid weird execution issues */ 	   AND A.birth_date is not null 	   AND A.gender is not null 	   AND B.birth_date is not null 	   AND B.gender is not null   INNER JOIN [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_last_split]  sp1 on A.row_id=sp1.row_id   INNER JOIN [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_last_split]  sp2 on B.row_id=sp2.row_id WHERE       sp1.output_string =sp2.output_string    AND ((sp1.output_string NOT IN (   \'LA\', \'DE\', \'JR\', \'ST\', \'DA\', 								 \'DELA\', \'AL\', \'EL\', \'VAN\')   AND LEN(sp1.output_string)>1) or A.name_last_clean=B.name_last_clean) 	/* AM 20180520: checking for 1 letter or other name parts only if its not the entire name*/',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcstg3
srcstg3 sink(input(
		master_row_id as string,
		gender as string,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		row_id as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		master_row_id,
		gender,
		birth_date,
		row_id)) ~> deststg3
